programme.title: Bellator Champions Series
programme.desc: Championship between Usman Nurmagomedov and Alexandr Shabliy headlines the event.

programme.title: Bellator Champions Series
programme.desc: Leah McCourt takes on Sara Collins in a women's featherweight fight in the main event of Bellator Champions Series London.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Standout grapplers Storley and Gracie swing for the fences in the Bellator 274 headliner.

programme.title: Bellator vs. Rizin
programme.desc: The top Bellator fighters represent the organization against Japanese MMA organization Rizin Fighting Federation. Watch the top stars from both promotions including A.J. McKee, Roberto de Souza, Patricio Pitbull, Kyoji Horiguchi and Juan Archuleta..

programme.title: Warriors Cup
programme.desc: Warriors Cup is the sole US partner of ONE Championship, featuring top Muay Thai athletes from across America and around the world!

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.desc: Replay from 4.4.25 Myrtle Beach Sports Center.

programme.desc: Ramazan Kuramagomedov vs. Jason Jackson from Ireland.

programme.title: Bellator Champions Series

programme.title: BKFC 29
programme.desc: Features Britain Hart vs. Charisa Sigala, plus Kai Stewart vs. Rusty Crowder in bare knuckle boxing action from Great Falls, Mont. From Sept. 10, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 30: Hunt vs. Henry
programme.desc: Features Lorenzo Hunt vs. Quentin Henry, Ben Rothwell vs. Bobo O'Bannon, plus Kaleb Harris vs. Harris Stephenson in bare knuckle boxing bouts from Monroe, La. From Oct. 1, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 49
programme.desc: The vacant welterweight title is up for grabs at BKFC 49 between Gorjan Slaveski & Jake Lindsey. From Aug. 25, 2023.

programme.title: Bellator Champions Series
programme.desc: From May 17, 2024 at Accor Arena in Paris.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Ilima-Lei MacFarlane defends her belt against Juliana Velasquez. From Dec. 10, 2020 at Mohegan Sun Arena in Uncasville, Conn.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: BELLATOR MMA champ Patricio Pitbull takes on Emmanuel Sanchez.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.title: International Brawling Championship 1
programme.desc: From Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia on Aug. 28, 2025.

programme.title: BKFC 31: Richman vs. Doolittle
programme.desc: Features Mike Richman vs. Isaac Doolittle, Jake Lindsey vs. Brandon Girtz, plus Chris Camozzi vs. Bubba McDaniel in bare knuckle boxing action from Broomfield, Colo. From Oct.15, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 32
programme.desc: Features Reginald Barnett Jr. vs. Geane Herrera, Jared Warren vs. Jay Jackson, plus Bobby Taylor vs. Gabriel Freyre in bare knuckle boxing action from Orlando, Fla. From Nov. 5, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 33
programme.desc: Features Houston Alexander vs. Joey Beltran, Kevin Croom vs. Sean Wilson, plus Carlos Trinidad vs. Rynell Riley in bare knuckle boxing action. From Nov. 18, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 50
programme.desc: Lorenzo Hunt vs. Chris Camozzi from Sep. 22, 2023.

programme.title: Bellator vs. Rizin 2
programme.desc: From July 29, 2023. Featuring Patricio Pitbull vs. Roberto de Souza, plus Kyoji Horgiuchi vs. Makoto Shinryu for the vacant Bellator Flyweight Championship.

programme.title: PFL Vault
programme.desc: Throwback to some of PFL's inaugural season's biggest hands landed including regular season and win or go home playoff agony.

programme.title: BKFC 34
programme.desc: Features Luis Palomino vs. Tom Shoaff for BKFC lightweight title, and David Mundell vs. Francesco Ricci for vacant BKFC middleweight title from Hollywood, Florida. From Dec. 3, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 35
programme.desc: Features Gorjan Slaveski vs. Yosdenis Cedeno, and Keith Richardson vs. Justin Scoggins in bare knuckle boxing action from Myrtle Beach, S.C. From Jan. 27, 2023.

programme.title: BKFC 18: Beltran vs. Shewmaker
programme.desc: BKFC title bouts featuring Joey Beltran vs. Sam Shewmaker, Hector Lombard vs. Joe Riggs, Luis Palomino vs. Tyler Goodjohn, and Thiago Alves vs. Ulysses Diaz in bare knuckle boxing action from Miami, Florida. From June 26, 2021.

programme.sub-title: What If Feeling Small Is Good For You?

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Mike and Jay head to Yosemite National Park to take on the Tuolumne Triple crown.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Mike and Jason head out on a hiking and pack rafting mission of the Sawtooth Range in central Idaho.

programme.title: Beyond Awestruck
programme.desc: The UCI team at the Tahoe Lab measures how awe impacts happiness, gratitude, relationships, and well-being.

programme.title: Beyond Awestruck
programme.sub-title: What If Feeling Small Is Good For You?
programme.desc: Follow the Tahoe Lab research team as they share unprecedented results on how 2 minutes of awe affects us all.
